nodes.title: Why summaries are the product
nodes.summary: If your post excerpts are sloppy, your ACT tree is sloppy. The adapter will not invent excerpts for you.

content.text: Every ACT node carries a summary field. This is the one-sentence preview an agent reads to decide whether to fetch your full post body. It's the most important text on the page.

The WordPress adapter takes the post's rendered excerpt as the summary when present. WordPress will auto-generate one from the first words of the post body if you don't author one — that produces an extracted summary, not an authored one. For best results, write deliberate excerpts in the post editor.
